findings.description: Nested <main> landmark elements - ensure the document has at most one main landmark at top level
findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
findings.evidence:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading [<html lang="en">]

findings.description: The HTML contains nested <main> elements, which is a structural duplication of the container element.
findings.evidence: HTML has <main> inside another <main> element. This is a structural artifact but does not duplicate any content text.
